title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Ahmedabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd:
CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd!
